title: Golden Crunchy Ukrainian Lardons Pilaf
description: A one-pot Ukrainian dish featuring marzipan and lardons, rendered to a crunchy perfection, this recipe is ayurvedic sattvic friendly and full of culture. It combines the sweetness of marzipan with the savory taste of lardons.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the lardons and cook until they are crispy and golden brown.
Add the crushed marzipan and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the rice, turmeric, salt, and black pepper, and stir well.
Add 4 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
